mapper.sql: id, inqb_apply_no, sources_apply_no, batch_no, data_sources, model_no, quantity, end_user, user_dept, inqb_status, inqb_validity, expiration_date, expected_delivery_date, description, inqb_date, inqb_type, inqb_classify, inqb_dept, inqb_user, inqb_user_name, reply_dept, reply_supplier_dept, reply_accept_hl, reply_no, reply_delivery_days, reply_user, reply_time, reply_reason_code, reply_reason, reply_remark, remark, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_inqb_apply
order by ${orderByClause}

update dbo.ops_inqb_apply
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
inqb_apply_no = #{record.inqbApplyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sources_apply_no = #{record.sourcesApplyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
batch_no = #{record.batchNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

reply_user = #{record.replyUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

reply_remark = #{record.replyRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},

create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
